name: Deep-Fried Wild Turkey
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except turkey, pot and peanut oil to make a marinade.
2. Let stand overnight in refrigerator.
3. Use a meat injecting needle to inject the turkey thoroughly with the marinade.
4. Place the turkey and marinade in a large plastic bag and refrigerate for 1 to 3 days.
5. Remove the turkey from the refrigerator just before cooking, allowing it to come to room temperature.
6. Heat the peanut oil in a deep fryer or heavy-based pot to 325°F (using a candy thermometer).
7. Immerse the turkey completely in the hot oil and cook for 4 minutes per pound.
8. Place a pie tin with holes in the bottom at the bottom of the deep fryer to prevent sticking.
Note: This recipe is a classic favorite. Enjoy!
